道場 The Way of Digital Mastery

THE WAY OF CONTINUOUS MASTERY

master: daniele d'agnelli | years of practice: 15 | rank: senior

THE PATH

a true master never stops training. the journey began at the university of bari — bsc computer science. the foundation. the first kata. years of practice followed, through four dojos across three countries.

then, at the height of professional rank, the master returned to study. msc ethical hacking & cybersecurity at abertay university. gchq-certified. graduated with distinction. not because the career required it — because the discipline demanded it.

TECHNIQUES ACQUIRED

prince2 practitioner — the way of the programme
stanford machine learning — the art of prediction
deeplearning.ai — the neural path
deep reinforcement learning — the adaptive strike
imperial college mathematics for ml — the foundations of power
probabilistic graphical models (with honors) — the pattern sight
hack the box — the proving ground
claude code / ai engineering — the emerging form
"the master is not the one who knows the most techniques. the master is the one who never stops learning new ones."
[dojo] [scroll] [linkedin]
